decision_subjects.title: N3 construction-frame placement
decision_subjects.missing_authority: N3 has no source or construction placement, center, pivot, or transform.

options.label: Construction-origin centered target frame
options.proposed_rule: Place N3 in the approved right-handed construction convention with its mathematical target origin at construction (X=0,Y=0), X/Y axes parallel to the declared construction axes, width 140 cm, and depth 110 cm. The origin is an interpreted production convention, never a recovered source center, and has no source-pixel relation.
options.evidence_effect: No exact source pixel, sample, measurement, physical target, or prior authority changes.
options.interpretation_effect: Creates a candidate construction-frame placement only; it does not locate N3 on any source panel.
known_risks: A centered production convention may not reproduce the apparent source-sheet placement.
It does not solve CL-003 mapping.

options.label: Top dimension-role midpoint as interpreted placement anchor
options.proposed_rule: After a separately approved whole-panel top transform, use the midpoint of the independent top X/Y dimension-role spans as an interpreted diagrammatic placement anchor. Preserve N3 at 140 x 110 cm and record that the anchor is not a source center, surface point, origin, or pivot measurement.
options.evidence_effect: No exact source pixel, sample, measurement, physical target, or prior authority changes.
options.interpretation_effect: Creates a source-referenced interpreted placement convention without claiming source ownership.
known_risks: Annotation endpoints are not surface points.
The apparent midpoint can load source-layout bias into construction.

options.label: Leave blocked
known_risks: N3 remains abstract; contact mapping, transition integration, bottom closure, and Step 11 remain blocked.

decision_subjects.recommendation_reason: It uses the fewest new assumptions and never presents a mathematical target origin as a source center.

decision_subjects.title: CL-003 source-to-target mapping
decision_subjects.missing_authority: No approved C-003 target-space inner boundary or source-to-target correspondence exists.

options.label: Four-sector order-preserving conditional mapping
options.proposed_rule: Preserve the recorded top CL-003 sectors top/bottom/left/right and within-sector sample order. If a separate C-003 target-space inner-boundary rule is later approved, assign each four-sample sector monotonically to its matching target quadrant between registered quadrant endpoints. Do not close source samples, infer a source center, or calculate target points before the inner boundary exists.
options.evidence_effect: No exact source pixel, sample, measurement, physical target, or prior authority changes.
options.interpretation_effect: Approves only a conditional ordering convention; no target-space contact coordinate is produced by this option alone.
dependencies: separate approved C-003 target-space inner boundary
known_risks: Equal semantic sectors may not encode true arc spacing.
The rule remains unusable until the C-003 inner target boundary is approved.

options.label: Upright owner-view endpoint constrained mapping
options.proposed_rule: Use approved future owner-view construction frames to constrain target X from front/back CL-003 endpoints and target Y from left/right endpoints, then treat top samples only as a validation set. Physical cross-panel pairs remain unproven, so every cross-view association must be separately registered before any coordinate is produced.
options.evidence_effect: No exact source pixel, sample, measurement, physical target, or prior authority changes.
options.interpretation_effect: Creates a candidate owner-view mapping strategy but no physical pair or target coordinate.
known_risks: Cross-panel physical pairs are currently zero.
A wrong pairing can move contacts while appearing numerically constrained.

options.label: Leave blocked
known_risks: CL-003 remains source-space evidence only; hidden-contact closure and every joined field remain blocked.

decision_subjects.recommendation_reason: It preserves only explicit sector labels and order, remains conditional, and creates no target coordinate before its dependency is approved.

flamestrike_output_decision.statement: I approve all 7 recommended decisions exactly as listed
